title: athyrium filix-femina subsp. alpestre
intro: Athyrium filix-femina subsp. alpestre is a subspecies of the lady fern, a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of Athyrium filix-femina subsp. alpestre include its potential to alleviate symptoms of eczema, acne, and other skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune function and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Athyrium filix-femina subsp. alpestre is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
